subject: [PATCH v5 09/18] mm: add MM_CP_UFFD_RWP change_protection() flag

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch adds two new flags to the change_protection() function in the Linux kernel: MM_CP_UFFD_RWP and MM_CP_UFFD_RWP_RESOLVE. These flags are used for userfaultfd (UFFD) read-write protection, allowing UFFD to use a special PTE bit to distinguish faults from mprotect(PROT_NONE) or NUMA hinting faults. The patch also updates various kernel functions to handle these new flags correctly, ensuring that anon, shmem, THP, and hugetlb all share the same semantics for UFFD RWP protection.
